# MapVina Native for Qt

[![GitHub Action build status](https://github.com/mapvina/mapvina-native/workflows/qt-ci/badge.svg)](https://github.com/mapvina/mapvina-native/actions/workflows/qt-ci.yml)

MapVina native Qt bindings have been moved to
[mapvina-native-qt](https://github.com/mapvina/mapvina-native-qt) repository.
This folder only contains minimal platform-specific implementation and allows
sufficient testing of the MapVina Core built with Qt as platform.
